title: Customer Feedback
subtitle: Review the latest sentiments from your community
noComment: Sellers have not yet provided a written testimonial for this experience.
reportInstruction: Please describe why you are reporting this review as offensive or inappropriate.
pleaseEnterReason: Please enter a reason for reporting
deleteReviewConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this review? This action cannot be undone.
unreportReviewConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove the reported status from this review?
dismissReportMessage: Are you sure you want to dismiss this report and remove the flagged status?
deleteReportedMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this reported review? This action cannot be undone.
banUserMessage: This will deactivate the review and ban the user from reviewing this store again. Proceed?
reviewBannedSuccessfully: Review deactivated and user banned successfully
unbanUserMessage: This will reactivate the review and allow the user to review this store again. Proceed?
